system.description: Flamethrower tanks are usable only by flamethrowers. These tanks hold a liquid fuel and a gas propellant. The gas is what forces the liquid out of the flamethrower nozzle at high speed, allowing it to project a long stream. One tank holds 6 bursts worth of fuel. The tanks have straps, allowing you to carry them on your back in place of your backpack, or you can just place them on the ground nearby if you don't intent to move.
